_doc: The valid competitive clusters for YOUR market — the single source of truth. validate_merge.py reads this to accept/reject rows, so you retarget the radar by editing THIS file (via /setup or by hand), never any Python. The defaults below suit software/AI markets; replace them with your market's sub-groups (e.g. a payments product: processors, orchestration, fraud, ledger, incumbent, vertical). Keep config/rubric.md and config/axes.json cluster keys in step.
